name: RStudio Codespace
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y libuv1-dev && sudo chown -R rstudio:rstudio /home/rstudio/project && echo '.libPaths(c("/usr/local/lib/R/site-library", .libPaths()))' >> /home/rstudio/.Rprofile && mkdir -p /home/rstudio/.config/rstudio/themes && cp -r /home/rstudio/project/core/rstudio-settings/rstudio-prefs.json /home/rstudio/.config/rstudio/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r /home/rstudio/project/core/rstudio-settings/themes/* /home/rstudio/.config/rstudio/themes/ 2>/dev/null || true && ln -sf /workspaces/$(basename $GITHUB_WORKSPACE) /home/rstudio/project || true
